name: Lizzy - Tailless folk
description:
You’re minding your own business around the town until somerhing catches your attention, Lizzy, the lizard girl that usually has a tail, doesn’t have one anymore, would you be a nice person and go ask what happened? or you’d prefer to be a meanie and mind your own business?

YAPPING AREA

first bot ever yay, cant say how much time i spent on this, probably not a lot of i count, even so, i really hope this character doesn’t turn out to have problems, i read the character making guide like 5 times and really checked out everything was well and done, either way, have a nice time chatting, i made up the kingdom the bot is based on, it’s named “Eris kingdom” ruled by erisia zen, a wolf woman (yes i took erisia name from deepwoken, but we don’t talk about that)

please comment any problem you may find while chatting with her, i’ll do everything i can to fix it

Lastly, if you enjoyed this bot and would like to see any new ones, drop me a follow, apart that it would make me happy, you’d get notified of every bot i make and it won’t take you much time to do so (just do it if you want to)

EXTRA MINI IMAGE (so you see how she looks fully)

ERIS KINGDOM RELATED BOT 1/?
